allow: PowerShell(node -e "const D=require\('better-sqlite3'\); const d=new D\(':memory:'\); console.log\('sqlite ok, version=', d.prepare\('SELECT sqlite_version\(\) v'\).get\(\).v\)")

PowerShell(node -e "const D=require\('better-sqlite3'\); const d=new D\('./data/gestionale.sqlite'\); const t=d.prepare\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name\\"\).all\(\); console.log\('Tabelle:'\); for\(const r of t\) console.log\(' -', r.name\);")
